allow: PowerShell($env:PGPASSWORD = "dlrsjam_pass"; & "C:\\Program Files\\PostgreSQL\\17\\bin\\psql.exe" -h localhost -p 5432 -U dlrsjam_user -d dlrsjam -c "SELECT id, application_number, status, submitted_at, verification_attempts FROM applications WHERE status = 'ACTION_REQUIRED';")
